verdict: SUPPORTED at 1/19 testable event(s) (Thw_142): a sustained, secular-trend-robust, in-band (0.02-2 yr) post-drainage speed-up — a data-side confirmation of the §G.4 hydraulic lag at a dynamically-active outlet. It is NOT a universal response: the other 18 testable drained lakes show no surge (amplitude bound ~3.1% of trunk speed), so most drainages do not produce a detectable sliding response. Thermal H^2/kappa kernel remains FALSIFIED (orders of magnitude off).
